overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a misty northern shoreline. The character passes a large wooden shipwreck and giant skeletal remains while transitioning from rocky beach to grassy meadow approaching a dense coniferous forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty rocky shoreline with wooden shipwreck

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the rocky shoreline beside the large wooden shipwreck

entered.detail: large viking-style wooden ship with curved bow beached on the rocky shore
calm foggy water extending to the horizon with low visibility
uneven gravel and stone terrain with patches of grass
dense coniferous trees covering the hillside in the background

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a misty rocky beach with a large wooden shipwreck beached on the left. The foggy sea stretches into the distance while sparse vegetation dots the gravel shore, and a dense coniferous forest lines the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: shoreline with giant skeletal remains and ship debris

events.description: passing the main shipwreck bow, revealing giant rib bones along the shore

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain scattered with ship debris and giant skeletal remains

entered.detail: massive curved skeletal ribs protruding from the ground like a ribcage structure
scattered broken wooden planks and timbers from the destroyed vessel
large rocks covered in green moss scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: Moving past the shipwreck, the scene reveals enormous skeletal rib bones protruding from the rocky shore. Geralt walks among the massive bones and scattered ship debris, with the misty sea still visible to the left and patches of tall grass appearing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow leading to coniferous forest edge

events.description: moving away from rocky shore into tall grass approaching forest edge

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through tall grass toward the dark forest tree line

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain rising above the tree line in the distance
leafless gnarled tree standing alone in the grassy field
broken wooden posts and beams from an old dock or structure

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shoreline behind, Geralt moves through a meadow of tall grass toward the dense forest edge. The giant bones and shipwreck fade from view as the terrain becomes grassy and mountainous, with the character approaching the dark tree line of the coniferous forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty northern shoreline that gradually transitions into a dense coniferous forest. It begins with Geralt walking across a rocky beach beside a large wooden shipwreck, with a foggy sea stretching toward the horizon. As he moves past the wreckage, the scene reveals enormous skeletal rib bones protruding from the gravel, blending ship debris with the emerging patches of tall grass. The camera then follows him as he leaves the shoreline behind, shifting from the rocky coast into a wide meadow of tall grass. Finally, the shipwreck and bones fade from view as the terrain becomes mountainous, leading the character directly toward the dark tree line of the forest.
